title: emelianthe panganensis subsp. panganensis
intro: Emelianthe panganensis subsp. panganensis, also known as Panga panga, is a type of tree native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Panga panga include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to support digestive health and immune system function. Traditional herbal preparations of Panga panga include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
